# Autotherm Kft. — Complete Company Profile

## 1. Company Identity

**Legal Name:** AUTOTHERM Kereskedelmi és Szolgáltató Kft.
**Trading Names:** Autotherm Kft. (Hungary), Autotherm Ltd. (English), Autotherm GmbH (German), Autotherm SRL (Romanian)
**Website:** https://www.autotherm.hu
**Founded:** 1992
**Founders:** Csurgó László, Dkfm. Peter Knerer
**Headquarters:** 6728 Szeged, Napos út 3., Hungary
**GPS:** 46° 16.060' N, 20° 7.331' E
**Phone:** +36 20 910 20 50
**Email:** autotherm@autotherm.hu
**Industry:** Refrigerated vehicle manufacturing

## 2. Company History

Autotherm Kft. was founded in 1992 with the aim of introducing Carrier refrigeration equipment to the Hungarian market. In 1995, the company began performing Thermo King repairs and established itself as a refrigeration service center in Southern Hungary. By 2007, Autotherm Kft. regained Carrier representation and became the top seller of Carrier cooling units for 3.5T vehicles in Hungary. In 2012, the company moved to a new facility at Napos út 3 in Szeged, expanding to four production halls.

## 3. Products and Services

### 3.1 Refrigerated Vans (Hűtős furgonok)
Van isolation and cooling unit installation for vehicles including Fiat Ducato, Mercedes Sprinter, Ford Transit, Renault Master, VW Crafter, Iveco Daily. Available with Carrier or Daikin cooling units.

### 3.2 Cooled Vehicle Bodies (Hűtőautók)
Lightweight box bodies and refrigerated boxes for 3.5T chassis. Available with Carrier or Daikin cooling units.

### 3.3 Commercial Vehicle Bodies (Járműfelépítmények)
Aluminium box bodies, refrigerated boxes, flatbed with tarpaulin, and special vehicle bodies for 3.5T chassis.

### 3.4 Deceased Transport Vehicles (Elhunytszállító autók)
Temperature-controlled funeral transport vehicles with +18°C cargo temperature, stainless steel interior, multi-level configurations.

### 3.5 Chassis Bodies (Alvázas felépítmények)
Custom-built 3.5T chassis bodies on any chassis make.

### 3.6 Vehicle Body Repair and Service
Repair, maintenance, and service of refrigerated vehicle bodies and cooling units.

## 4. Manufacturing Facility

- **Location:** 6728 Szeged, Napos út 3., Hungary
- **Total Area:** 1500 m²
- **Production Halls:** 4
  - Hall 1-2: Vehicle body manufacturing and van isolation
  - Hall 3: Metal fabrication
  - Hall 4: Cooling unit installation and service
- **Employees:** 33

## 5. Key Statistics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Years in operation | 30+ |
| Satisfied customers | 3000+ |
| Annual conversions | 280+ |
| Employees | 33 |
| Production space | 1500 m² |
| Cooling partners | Carrier Transicold, Daikin, Thermo King |
| Service area | Hungary, Austria, Germany, Romania, European Union |

## 6. Cooling Partners

- **Carrier Transicold** — Official partner. Sales, installation, and service of Xarios and Supra models.
- **Daikin** — Service and repair of Daikin refrigeration units.
- **Thermo King** — Historic partner since 1995. Repair and service.

## 7. Service Area

The company serves customers in Hungary, Austria, Germany, Romania, and the European Union. Communications are handled in Hungarian, English, German, and Romanian.

## Contact
